message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 3. 女の子の招待

actor "お嬢" as Hostess
participant "グループスタッフ" as GroupStaff
participant "CABABA" as CababaSystem
database "データベース" as Database
actor "CABABA管理者" as Admin

rectangle "女の子登録" {
    activate GroupStaff
    GroupStaff -> CababaSystem: 設定画面から女の子の参加招待URLを作成
    activate CababaSystem
    
    CababaSystem -> Database: SELECT Group.group_id
    activate Database
    Database --> CababaSystem
    deactivate Database
    
    CababaSystem --> GroupStaff: 参加招待URLを表示
    deactivate CababaSystem
    deactivate GroupStaff
    
    activate Hostess
    GroupStaff -> Hostess: URLを共有
    Hostess -> CababaSystem: URLをクリック, LINEログイン画面へ
    activate CababaSystem
    
    CababaSystem -> Database: UPDATE hostess.groups.add
    activate Database
    Database --> CababaSystem
    deactivate Database
    
    CababaSystem --> GroupStaff: お嬢のグループ登録完了
    deactivate CababaSystem
    deactivate Hostess
}

@enduml
```
